verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We come into Your presence To sing a song to You A song of praise and honor For all the things You helped us through

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You gave a life worth living A life in love with You And now I just love giving All my praises back to You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're the Father of creation The risen Lamb of God You're the One who walked away From the empty tomb that day And You set Your people free with Love and liberty And I can walk with You Everynight and everyday
